caption: A man sits at a table in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold lettering, and gold chains. He wears a headset and speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. In his hand, he holds a small, yellow piece of paper. The background features a banner with the text "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "BOSS TALK 101," along with a logo that says "UNICORN HUSTLE" next to five stars. On the table, there is a black laptop and a white mug with "BOSS TALK 101" printed on it. As the scene progresses, the man remains seated, continuing to speak while looking slightly off-camera to the left. His facial expression and hand position remain relatively consistent, with slight shifts in his head posture as he talks.
